title: Glowing 3D Totem
body: This resource pack transforms the standard Totem item into a fully custom, glowing 3D model giving it a unique and visually striking appearence in-game! Its designed as a subpack of Glowing 3D Tools , the original resource pack that introduces glowing 3D models for various tools and items. This subpack is amazing for players who want to enjoy the enhanced Totem Of Undying 3D model without installing the entire Glowing 3D Tools pack, keeping things simple while still adding a touch of style to your gameplay.
